import { Component, Input } from '@angular/core'; import { ResumeEditorResume } from '../../../core/models/resume.model'; @Component({ selector: 'app-ai-tools-panel', templateUrl: './ai-tools-panel.component.html' }) export class AiToolsPanelComponent { @Input() resume: ResumeEditorResume | null = null; }

Turn generic responsibilities into measurable impact bullets.

Current editor state is ready for ATS scoring integration and keyword optimization.
